name: Apple Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice hot fruit (apples, cherries) and pour into a greased casserole dish.
2. In a large bowl, whisk together the sugar, egg whites, boiling water, flour, salt, and baking powder until smooth.
3. Pour the batter over the fruit in the casserole dish.
4. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 30 minutes or until golden brown and set.
